name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-sqlserver

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-sqlserver
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Sqlserver SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Sqlserver SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-sqlserver
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common sqlserver
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.AccountCreateInfo.__init__
documentation:
---
param _AccountType: "\u8D26\u53F7\u7C7B\u578B\uFF0CIsAdmin\u7684\u6269\u5C55\u5B57\
  \u6BB5\u3002 L0-\u8D85\u7EA7\u6743\u9650(\u57FA\u7840\u7248\u72EC\u6709),L1-\u9AD8\
  \u7EA7\u6743\u9650,L2-\u7279\u6B8A\u6743\u9650,L3-\u666E\u901A\u6743\u9650\uFF0C\
  \u9ED8\u8BA4L3"
param _Authentication: "win-windows\u9274\u6743,sql-sqlserver\u9274\u6743\uFF0C\u4E0D\
  \u586B\u9ED8\u8BA4\u503C\u4E3Asql-sqlserver\u9274\u6743"
param _DBPrivileges: "DB\u6743\u9650\u5217\u8868"
param _IsAdmin: "\u662F\u5426\u4E3A\u7BA1\u7406\u5458\u8D26\u6237\uFF0C\u5F53\u503C\

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.AccountPrivilegeModifyInfo.UserName
documentation:
数据库用户名
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.AccountPrivilegeModifyInfo.DBPrivileges
documentation:
账号权限变更信息。参数DBPrivileges和AccAllDB只能二选一
\:rtype: list of DBPrivilegeModifyInfo

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.AccountPrivilegeModifyInfo.IsAdmin
documentation:
表示是否为管理员账户，当值为true，表示是 管理员。若实例 是 单节点，则管理员所在的 账号类型为超级权限账号 ，即AccountType=L0；若实例 是 双节点，则管理员所在的 账号类型为高级权限账号，即AccountType=L1；当值为false，表示 不是管理员，则账号类型为普通账号，即AccountType=L3
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.AccountPrivilegeModifyInfo.AccountType
documentation:
账号类型，IsAdmin字段的扩展字段。 L0-超级权限(基础版独有),L1-高级权限,L2-特殊权限,L3-普通权限，默认L3
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.AccountPrivilegeModifyInfo.AccAllDB
documentation:
全量修改指定账号下的所有DB权限，只支持特殊权限账号和普通权限账号。参数DBPrivileges和AccAllDB只能二选一
\:rtype: {class}`tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.SelectAllDB`
数据库账号权限变更信息

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CheckItem.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _CheckName
>
> 检查项目名称，CK_CPU-变配后CPU风险检查；CK_MASTER_STORAGE-只读副本变配下，只读副本磁盘空间不小于主实例空间检查；CK_MEMORY-变配后内存风险检查；CK_STORAGE-变配后磁盘空间风险检查；CK_UPGRATE-变配是否需要迁移检查；
> ```

注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。
: ```
  type CheckName

  str

  param _CurrentValue

  检查项目返回值，CK_CPU-当前CPU近7天最大的使用率(%) ；CK_MASTER_STORAGE-主实例的磁盘空间(GB)；CK_MEMORY-当前内存近7天最大的使用值（GB)；
  ```

CK_STORAGE-当前磁盘近7天最大的使用值（GB)；CK_UPGRATE- 当前变配检查是否需要迁移，MIGRATE需要迁移变配，LOCAL本地变配；
: ```
  type CurrentValue

  str

  param _Passed

  检查条目是否通过 0-不通过，不能变配； 1-通过，可以变配

  type Passed

  int

  param _IsAffect

  本条目变配是否对实例有影响 0-没有影响 1-有影响

  type IsAffect

  int

  param _Msg

  有影响或者不通过的情况下的必要描述

  type Msg

  str

  param _MsgCode

  描述对应的代码

  type MsgCode

  int
  ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBackupMigrationRequest.UploadType

\:rtype: str

documentation:
任务名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBackupMigrationRequest.BackupFiles
documentation:
UploadType是COS_URL时这里填URL，COS_UPLOAD这里填备份文件的名字。只支持1个备份文件，但1个备份文件内可包含多个库
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Cpu
documentation:
实例的CPU核心数
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Memory
documentation:
实例内存大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Storage
documentation:
实例磁盘大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.SubnetId
documentation:
VPC子网ID，形如subnet-bdoe83fa
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.VpcId
documentation:
VPC网络ID，形如vpc-dsp338hz
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.MachineType
documentation:
购买实例的宿主机类型，CLOUD_PREMIUM-虚拟机高性能云硬盘，CLOUD_SSD-虚拟机SSD云硬盘,CLOUD_HSSD-虚拟机增强型SSD云硬盘，CLOUD_BSSD-虚拟机通用型SSD云盘
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.InstanceChargeType
documentation:
付费模式，取值支持 PREPAID（预付费），POSTPAID（后付费）。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.ProjectId
documentation:
项目ID
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.GoodsNum
documentation:
本次购买几个实例，默认值为1。取值不超过10
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.DBVersion
documentation:
sqlserver版本，目前所有支持的版本有：2008R2 (SQL Server 2008 R2 Enterprise)，2012SP3 (SQL Server 2012 Enterprise)，201202 (SQL Server 2012 Standard)，2014SP2 (SQL Server 2014 Enterprise)，201402 (SQL Server 2014 Standard)，2016SP1 (SQL Server 2016 Enterprise)，201602 (SQL Server 2016 Standard)，2017 (SQL Server 2017 Enterprise)，201702 (SQL Server 2017 Standard)，2019 (SQL Server 2019 Enterprise)，201902 (SQL Server 2019 Standard)。每个地域支持售卖的版本不同，可通过DescribeProductConfig接口来拉取每个地域可售卖的版本信息。不填，默认为版本2008R2。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Period
documentation:
购买实例周期，默认取值为1，表示一个月。取值不超过48
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.SecurityGroupList
documentation:
安全组列表，填写形如sg-xxx的安全组ID
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.AutoRenewFlag
documentation:
自动续费标志：0-正常续费  1-自动续费，默认为1自动续费。只在购买预付费实例时有效。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.AutoVoucher
documentation:
是否自动使用代金券；1 - 是，0 - 否，默认不使用
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.VoucherIds
documentation:
代金券ID数组，目前单个订单只能使用一张
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Weekly
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，以周为单位，表示周几允许维护，1-7分别代表周一到周末
\:rtype: list of int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.StartTime
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，每天可维护的开始时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Span
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，持续时间，单位：小时
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.ResourceTags
documentation:
新建实例绑定的标签集合
\:rtype: list of ResourceTag

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.Collation
documentation:
系统字符集排序规则，默认：Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateBasicDBInstancesRequest.TimeZone
documentation:
系统时区，默认：China Standard Time
\:rtype: str
CreateBasicDBInstances请求参数结构体

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Zone
documentation:
实例可用区，类似ap-guangzhou-1（广州一区）；实例可售卖区域可以通过接口DescribeZones获取
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Memory
documentation:
实例内存大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Storage
documentation:
实例磁盘大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Cpu
documentation:
实例核心数
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.MachineType
documentation:
购买实例的宿主机磁盘类型,CLOUD_HSSD-虚拟机加强型SSD云盘，CLOUD_TSSD-虚拟机极速型SSD云盘，CLOUD_BSSD-虚拟机通用型SSD云盘
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.InstanceChargeType
documentation:
付费模式，取值支持 PREPAID（预付费），POSTPAID（后付费）。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.ProjectId
documentation:
项目ID
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.GoodsNum
documentation:
本次购买几个实例，默认值为1。取值不超过10
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.SubnetId
documentation:
VPC子网ID，形如subnet-bdoe83fa；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.VpcId
documentation:
VPC网络ID，形如vpc-dsp338hz；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Period
documentation:
购买实例周期，默认取值为1，表示一个月。取值不超过48
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.AutoVoucher
documentation:
是否自动使用代金券；1 - 是，0 - 否，默认不使用
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.VoucherIds
documentation:
代金券ID数组，目前单个订单只能使用一张
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.DBVersion
documentation:
sqlserver版本，目前所有支持的版本有：2008R2 (SQL Server 2008 R2 Enterprise)，2012SP3 (SQL Server 2012 Enterprise)，201202 (SQL Server 2012 Standard)，2014SP2 (SQL Server 2014 Enterprise)，201402 (SQL Server 2014 Standard)，2016SP1 (SQL Server 2016 Enterprise)，201602 (SQL Server 2016 Standard)，2017 (SQL Server 2017 Enterprise)，201702 (SQL Server 2017 Standard)，2019 (SQL Server 2019 Enterprise)，201902 (SQL Server 2019 Standard)。每个地域支持售卖的版本不同，可通过DescribeProductConfig接口来拉取每个地域可售卖的版本信息。不填，默认为版本2008R2。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.AutoRenewFlag
documentation:
自动续费标志：0-正常续费  1-自动续费，默认为1自动续费。只在购买预付费实例时有效。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.SecurityGroupList
documentation:
安全组列表，填写形如sg-xxx的安全组ID
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Weekly
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，以周为单位，表示周几允许维护，1-7分别代表周一到周末
\:rtype: list of int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.StartTime
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，每天可维护的开始时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Span
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，持续时间，单位：小时
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.MultiZones
documentation:
是否跨可用区部署，默认值为false
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.ResourceTags
documentation:
新建实例绑定的标签集合
\:rtype: list of ResourceTag

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.Collation
documentation:
系统字符集排序规则，默认：Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudDBInstancesRequest.TimeZone
documentation:
系统时区，默认：China Standard Time
\:rtype: str
CreateCloudDBInstances请求参数结构体

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.InstanceId
documentation:
主实例ID，格式如：mssql-3l3fgqn7
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Zone
documentation:
实例可用区，类似ap-guangzhou-1（广州一区）；实例可售卖区域可以通过接口DescribeZones获取
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupType
documentation:
只读组类型选项，1-按照一个实例一个只读组的方式发货，2-新建只读组后发货，所有实例都在这个只读组下面， 3-发货的所有实例都在已有的只读组下面
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Memory
documentation:
实例内存大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Storage
documentation:
实例磁盘大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Cpu
documentation:
实例核心数
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.MachineType
documentation:
购买实例的宿主机磁盘类型,CLOUD_HSSD-虚拟机加强型SSD云盘，CLOUD_TSSD-虚拟机极速型SSD云盘，CLOUD_BSSD-虚拟机通用型SSD云盘
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupForcedUpgrade
documentation:
0-默认不升级主实例，1-强制升级主实例完成ro部署；主实例为非集群版时需要填1，强制升级为集群版。填1 说明您已同意将主实例升级到集群版实例。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupId
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=3时必填,已存在的只读组ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupName
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2时必填，新建的只读组名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2时必填，新建的只读组是否开启延迟剔除功能，1-开启，0-关闭。当只读副本与主实例延迟大于阈值后，自动剔除。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupMaxDelayTime
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2 且 ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay=1时必填，新建的只读组延迟剔除的阈值。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupMinInGroup
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2 且 ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay=1时必填，新建的只读组延迟剔除后至少保留只读副本的个数。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.InstanceChargeType
documentation:
付费模式，取值支持 PREPAID（预付费），POSTPAID（后付费）。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.GoodsNum
documentation:
本次即将购买的实例数量，默认取值2。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.SubnetId
documentation:
VPC子网ID，形如subnet-bdoe83fa；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.VpcId
documentation:
VPC网络ID，形如vpc-dsp338hz；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Period
documentation:
购买实例周期，默认取值为1，表示一个月。取值不超过48
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.SecurityGroupList
documentation:
安全组列表，填写形如sg-xxx的安全组ID
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.AutoVoucher
documentation:
是否自动使用代金券；1 - 是，0 - 否，默认不使用
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.VoucherIds
documentation:
代金券ID数组，目前单个订单只能使用一张
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ResourceTags
documentation:
新建实例绑定的标签集合
\:rtype: list of ResourceTag

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Collation
documentation:
系统字符集排序规则，默认：Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.TimeZone
documentation:
系统时区，默认：China Standard Time
\:rtype: str
CreateCloudReadOnlyDBInstances请求参数结构体

sqlserver版本，目前所有支持的版本有：2008R2 (SQL Server 2008 R2 Enterprise)，2012SP3 (SQL Server 2012 Enterprise)，201202 (SQL Server 2012 Standard)，2014SP2 (SQL Server 2014 Enterprise)，201402 (SQL Server 2014 Standard)，2016SP1 (SQL Server 2016 Enterprise)，201602 (SQL Server 2016 Standard)，2017 (SQL Server 2017 Enterprise)，201702 (SQL Server 2017 Standard)，2019 (SQL Server 2019 Enterprise)，201902 (SQL Server 2019 Standard)。每个地域支持售卖的版本不同，可通过DescribeProductConfig接口来拉取每个地域可售卖的版本信息。不填，默认为版本2008R2。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.AutoRenewFlag
documentation:
自动续费标志：0-正常续费  1-自动续费，默认为1自动续费。只在购买预付费实例时有效。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.SecurityGroupList
documentation:
安全组列表，填写形如sg-xxx的安全组ID
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.Weekly
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，以周为单位，表示周几允许维护，1-7分别代表周一到周末
\:rtype: list of int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.StartTime
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，每天可维护的开始时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.Span
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，持续时间，单位：小时
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.HAType
documentation:
购买高可用实例的类型：DUAL-双机高可用  CLUSTER-集群，默认值为DUAL
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.MultiZones
documentation:
是否跨可用区部署，默认值为false
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.ResourceTags
documentation:
新建实例绑定的标签集合
\:rtype: list of ResourceTag

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.Collation
documentation:
系统字符集排序规则，默认：Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateDBInstancesRequest.TimeZone
documentation:
系统时区，默认：China Standard Time
\:rtype: str
CreateDBInstances请求参数结构体

  \u540C\u610F\u5C06\u4E3B\u5B9E\u4F8B\u5347\u7EA7\u5230\u96C6\u7FA4\u7248\u5B9E\u4F8B\

  \u80FD\uFF0C1-\u5F00\u542F\uFF0C0-\u5173\u95ED\u3002\u5F53\u53EA\u8BFB\u526F\u672C\
  \u4E0E\u4E3B\u5B9E\u4F8B\u5EF6\u8FDF\u5927\u4E8E\u9608\u503C\u540E\uFF0C\u81EA\u52A8\

param _ReadOnlyGroupMaxDelayTime: "ReadOnlyGroupType=2 \u4E14 ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay=1\u65F6\

  \u8D27\uFF0C2-\u65B0\u5EFA\u53EA\u8BFB\u7EC4\u540E\u53D1\u8D27\uFF0C\u6240\u6709\

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.InstanceId
documentation:
主实例ID，格式如：mssql-3l3fgqn7
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Zone
documentation:
实例可用区，类似ap-guangzhou-1（广州一区）；实例可售卖区域可以通过接口DescribeZones获取
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupType
documentation:
只读组类型选项，1-按照一个实例一个只读组的方式发货，2-新建只读组后发货，所有实例都在这个只读组下面， 3-发货的所有实例都在已有的只读组下面
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Memory
documentation:
实例内存大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Storage
documentation:
实例磁盘大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupForcedUpgrade
documentation:
0-默认不升级主实例，1-强制升级主实例完成ro部署；主实例为非集群版时需要填1，强制升级为集群版。填1 说明您已同意将主实例升级到集群版实例。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupId
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=3时必填,已存在的只读组ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupName
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2时必填，新建的只读组名称
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2时必填，新建的只读组是否开启延迟剔除功能，1-开启，0-关闭。当只读副本与主实例延迟大于阈值后，自动剔除。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupMaxDelayTime
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2 且 ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay=1时必填，新建的只读组延迟剔除的阈值。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ReadOnlyGroupMinInGroup
documentation:
ReadOnlyGroupType=2 且 ReadOnlyGroupIsOfflineDelay=1时必填，新建的只读组延迟剔除后至少保留只读副本的个数。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.InstanceChargeType
documentation:
付费模式，取值支持 PREPAID（预付费），POSTPAID（后付费）。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.GoodsNum
documentation:
本次购买几个只读实例，默认值为2。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.SubnetId
documentation:
VPC子网ID，形如subnet-bdoe83fa；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.VpcId
documentation:
VPC网络ID，形如vpc-dsp338hz；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Period
documentation:
购买实例周期，默认取值为1，表示一个月。取值不超过48
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.SecurityGroupList
documentation:
安全组列表，填写形如sg-xxx的安全组ID
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.AutoVoucher
documentation:
是否自动使用代金券；1 - 是，0 - 否，默认不使用
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.VoucherIds
documentation:
代金券ID数组，目前单个订单只能使用一张
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.ResourceTags
documentation:
新建实例绑定的标签集合
\:rtype: list of ResourceTag

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.Collation
documentation:
系统字符集排序规则，默认：Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.CreateReadOnlyDBInstancesRequest.TimeZone
documentation:
系统时区，默认：China Standard Time
\:rtype: str
CreateReadOnlyDBInstances请求参数结构体

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.Id
documentation:
备份文件唯一标识，RestoreInstance接口会用到该字段，对于单库备份文件只返回第一条记录的备份文件唯一标识；单库备份文件需要通过DescribeBackupFiles接口获取全部记录的可回档的ID
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.FileName
documentation:
文件名，对于单库备份文件只返回第一条记录的文件名；单库备份文件需要通过DescribeBackupFiles接口获取全部记录的文件名
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.BackupName
documentation:
备份任务名称，可自定义
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.StartTime
documentation:
备份开始时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.EndTime
documentation:
备份结束时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.Size
documentation:
文件大小，单位 KB，对于单库备份文件只返回第一条记录的文件大小；单库备份文件需要通过DescribeBackupFiles接口获取全部记录的文件大小
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.Strategy
documentation:
备份策略，0-实例备份；1-多库备份；实例状态是0-创建中时，该字段为默认值0，无实际意义
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.Status
documentation:
备份文件状态，0-创建中；1-成功；2-失败
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.BackupWay
documentation:
备份方式，0-定时备份；1-手动临时备份；实例状态是0-创建中时，该字段为默认值0，无实际意义
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.DBs
documentation:
DB列表，对于单库备份文件只返回第一条记录包含的库名；单库备份文件需要通过DescribeBackupFiles接口获取全部记录的库名。
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.InternalAddr
documentation:
内网下载地址，对于单库备份文件只返回第一条记录的内网下载地址；单库备份文件需要通过DescribeBackupFiles接口获取全部记录的下载地址
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.ExternalAddr
documentation:
外网下载地址，对于单库备份文件只返回第一条记录的外网下载地址；单库备份文件需要通过DescribeBackupFiles接口获取全部记录的下载地址
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.GroupId
documentation:
聚合Id，对于打包备份文件不返回此值。通过此值调用DescribeBackupFiles接口，获取单库备份文件的详细信息
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeBackupByFlowIdResponse.RequestId
documentation:
唯一请求 ID，由服务端生成，每次请求都会返回（若请求因其他原因未能抵达服务端，则该次请求不会获得 RequestId）。定位问题时需要提供该次请求的 RequestId。
\:rtype: str
DescribeBackupByFlowId返回参数结构体

classes.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInquiryPriceParameterRequest

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInquiryPriceParameterRequest.__init__
documentation:
> ```
> param _Zone
>
> 可用区ID。该参数可以通过调用 DescribeZones 接口的返回值中的Zone字段来获取。
>
> type Zone
>
> str
>
> param _Memory
>
> 内存大小，单位：GB
>
> type Memory
>
> int
>
> param _Storage
>
> 实例容量大小，单位：GB。
>
> type Storage
>
> int
>
> param _InstanceType
>
> 购买实例的类型 HA-高可用型(包括双机高可用，alwaysOn集群)，RO-只读副本型，SI-单节点型,cvmHA-新版高可用,cvmRO-新版只读
>
> type InstanceType
>
> str
>
> param _InstanceChargeType
>
> 计费类型，取值支持 PREPAID，POSTPAID。
>
> type InstanceChargeType
>
> str
>
> param _Cpu
>
> 预购买实例的CPU核心数
>
> type Cpu
>
> int
>
> param _Period
>
> 购买时长，单位：月。取值为1到48，默认为1
>
> type Period
>
> int
>
> param _GoodsNum
>
> 一次性购买的实例数量。取值1-100，默认取值为1
>
> type GoodsNum
>
> int
>
> param _DBVersion
>
> sqlserver版本，目前所有支持的版本有：2008R2 (SQL Server 2008 R2 Enterprise)，2012SP3 (SQL Server 2012 Enterprise)，201202 (SQL Server 2012 Standard)，2014SP2 (SQL Server 2014 Enterprise)，201402 (SQL Server 2014 Standard)，2016SP1 (SQL Server 2016 Enterprise)，201602 (SQL Server 2016 Standard)，2017 (SQL Server 2017 Enterprise)，201702 (SQL Server 2017 Standard)，2019 (SQL Server 2019 Enterprise)，201902 (SQL Server 2019 Standard)。每个地域支持售卖的版本不同，可通过DescribeProductConfig接口来拉取每个地域可售卖的版本信息。不填，默认为版本2008R2。
>
> type DBVersion
>
> str
>
> param _MachineType
>
> 购买实例的宿主机类型，PM-物理机, CLOUD_PREMIUM-云服务器高性能云盘，CLOUD_SSD-云服务器SSD云盘,
> ```

CLOUD_HSSD-云服务器加强型SSD云盘，CLOUD_TSSD-云服务器极速型SSD云盘，CLOUD_BSSD-云服务器通用型SSD云盘
: ```
  type MachineType

  str
  ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Zone
documentation:
实例可用区，类似ap-guangzhou-1（广州一区）；实例可售卖区域可以通过接口DescribeZones获取
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Cpu
documentation:
实例核心数
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Memory
documentation:
实例内存大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Storage
documentation:
实例磁盘大小，单位GB
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.InstanceType
documentation:
购买实例的类型 HA-高可用型(包括双机高可用，alwaysOn集群)，RO-只读副本型，SI-单节点型,BI-商业智能服务,cvmHA-新版高可用,cvmRO-新版只读
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.MachineType
documentation:
购买实例的宿主机磁盘类型,CLOUD_HSSD-云服务器加强型SSD云盘，CLOUD_TSSD-云服务器极速型SSD云盘，CLOUD_BSSD-云服务器通用型SSD云盘
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.InstanceChargeType
documentation:
付费模式，取值支持 PREPAID（预付费），POSTPAID（后付费）。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.ProjectId
documentation:
项目ID
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.GoodsNum
documentation:
本次购买几个实例，默认值为1。取值不超过10
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.DBVersion
documentation:
sqlserver版本，目前所有支持的版本有：2008R2 (SQL Server 2008 R2 Enterprise)，2012SP3 (SQL Server 2012 Enterprise)，201202 (SQL Server 2012 Standard)，2014SP2 (SQL Server 2014 Enterprise)，201402 (SQL Server 2014 Standard)，2016SP1 (SQL Server 2016 Enterprise)，201602 (SQL Server 2016 Standard)，2017 (SQL Server 2017 Enterprise)，201702 (SQL Server 2017 Standard)，2019 (SQL Server 2019 Enterprise)，201902 (SQL Server 2019 Standard)。每个地域支持售卖的版本不同，可通过DescribeProductConfig接口来拉取每个地域可售卖的版本信息。不填，默认为版本2008R2。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.SubnetId
documentation:
VPC子网ID，形如subnet-bdoe83fa；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.VpcId
documentation:
VPC网络ID，形如vpc-dsp338hz；SubnetId和VpcId需同时设置或者同时不设置
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Period
documentation:
购买实例周期，默认取值为1，表示一个月。取值不超过48
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.SecurityGroupList
documentation:
安全组列表，填写形如sg-xxx的安全组ID
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.AutoRenewFlag
documentation:
自动续费标志：0-正常续费  1-自动续费，默认为1自动续费。只在购买预付费实例时有效。
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Weekly
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，以周为单位，表示周几允许维护，1-7分别代表周一到周末
\:rtype: list of int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.StartTime
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，每天可维护的开始时间
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Span
documentation:
可维护时间窗配置，持续时间，单位：小时
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.MultiZones
documentation:
是否跨可用区部署，默认值为false
\:rtype: bool

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.ResourceTags
documentation:
新建实例绑定的标签集合
\:rtype: list of ResourceTag

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.TimeZone
documentation:
系统时区，默认：China Standard Time
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.DescribeInstanceTradeParameterRequest.Collation
documentation:
系统字符集排序规则，默认：Chinese_PRC_CI_AS
\:rtype: str
DescribeInstanceTradeParameter请求参数结构体

documentation:
> ```
> param _MigrationId
>
> 备份导入任务ID 或 增量导入任务ID
>
> type MigrationId
>
> str
>
> param _MigrationName
>
> 备份导入名称，增量导入任务该字段为空

注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。
: ```
  type MigrationName

  str

  param _AppId

  应用ID

  type AppId

  int

  param _Region

  地域

  type Region

  str

  param _InstanceId

  迁移目标实例ID

  type InstanceId

  str

  param _RecoveryType

  迁移任务恢复类型

  type RecoveryType

  str

  param _UploadType

  备份用户上传类型，COS_URL-备份放在用户的对象存储上，提供URL。COS_UPLOAD-备份放在业务的对象存储上，用户上传

  type UploadType

  str

  param _BackupFiles

  备份文件列表，UploadType确定，COS_URL则保存URL，COS_UPLOAD则保存备份名称

  type BackupFiles

  list of str

  param _Status

  迁移任务状态，2-创建完成，7-全量导入中，8-等待增量，9-导入成功，10-导入失败，12-增量导入中

  type Status

  int

  param _CreateTime

  迁移任务创建时间

  type CreateTime

  str

  param _StartTime

  迁移任务开始时间

  type StartTime

  str

  param _EndTime

  迁移任务结束时间

  type EndTime

  str

  param _Message

  说明信息

  type Message

  str

  param _Detail

  迁移细节

  type Detail



  param _Action

  当前状态允许的操作

  type Action



  param _IsRecovery

  是否是最终恢复，全量导入任务该字段为空
  ```

注意：此字段可能返回 null，表示取不到有效值。
: ```

  str

  重命名的数据库名称集合

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.MigrationAction.AllAction
documentation:
支持的所有操作，值包括：view(查看任务) ，modify(修改任务)， start(启动任务)，incremental(创建增量任务)，delete(删除任务)，upload(获取上传权限)。
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.MigrationAction.AllowedAction
documentation:

param _BackupModel: "\u5907\u4EFD\u6A21\u5F0F\uFF08\u5FC5\u586B\uFF09\uFF0Cmaster_pkg-\u4E3B\
  \u8282\u70B9\u4E0A\u6253\u5305\u5907\u4EFD\u6587\u4EF6\uFF1Bmaster_no_pkg-\u4E3B\
  \u8282\u70B9\u5355\u5E93\u5907\u4EFD\u6587\u4EF6\uFF1Bslave_pkg-\u4ECE\u8282\u70B9\
  \u4E0A\u6253\u5305\u5907\u4EFD\u6587\u4EF6\uFF1Bslave_no_pkg-\u4ECE\u8282\u70B9\u4E0A\
  \u5355\u5E93\u5907\u4EFD\u6587\u4EF6\uFF0C\u4ECE\u8282\u70B9\u4E0A\u5907\u4EFD\u53EA\
  \u6709\u5728always on\u5BB9\u707E\u6A21\u5F0F\u4E0B\u652F\u6301\u3002"
param _BackupSaveDays: "\u6570\u636E(\u65E5\u5FD7)\u5907\u4EFD\u4FDD\u7559\u5929\u6570\
  \uFF08\u5FC5\u586B\uFF09\uFF0C\u53D6\u503C\\[3-1830\\]\u5929\uFF0C\u9ED8\u8BA47\u5929"
param _BackupTime: "\u5907\u4EFD\u65F6\u95F4\u70B9\uFF0C\u53D6\u503C\u4E3A0-23\u7684\

param _BackupType: "\u5907\u4EFD\u7C7B\u578B\uFF0C\u5F53length(BackupDay) \\<=7 &&\
  \ length(BackupDay) >=2\u65F6\uFF0C\u53D6\u503C\u4E3Aweekly\uFF0C\u5F53length(BackupDay)=1\u65F6\
  \uFF0C\u53D6\u503Cdaily\uFF0C\u9ED8\u8BA4daily"
param _InstanceId: "\u5B9E\u4F8BID"

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.InstanceId
documentation:
实例ID
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.BackupType
documentation:
备份类型，当length(BackupDay) \<=7 && length(BackupDay) >=2时，取值为weekly，当length(BackupDay)=1时，取值daily，默认daily
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.BackupTime
documentation:
备份时间点，取值为0-23的整数
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.BackupDay
documentation:
BackupType取值为daily时，表示备份间隔天数。当前取值只能为1
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.BackupModel
documentation:
备份模式（必填），master_pkg-主节点上打包备份文件；master_no_pkg-主节点单库备份文件；slave_pkg-从节点上打包备份文件；slave_no_pkg-从节点上单库备份文件，从节点上备份只有在always on容灾模式下支持。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.BackupCycle
documentation:
BackupType取值为weekly时，表示每周的星期N做备份。（如果数据备份保留时间\<7天，则取值\[1,2,3,4,5,6,7\]。如果数据备份保留时间>=7天，则备份周期取值至少是一周的任意2天）
\:rtype: list of int non-negative

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.BackupSaveDays
documentation:
数据(日志)备份保留天数（必填），取值\[3-1830\]天，默认7天
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.RegularBackupEnable
documentation:
定期备份状态 enable-开启，disable-关闭，默认关闭
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.RegularBackupSaveDays
documentation:
定期备份保留天数 \[90 - 3650\]天，默认365天
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.RegularBackupStrategy
documentation:
定期备份策略 years-每年，quarters-每季度，months-每月，默认months
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.RegularBackupCounts
documentation:
定期备份保留个数，默认1个
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ModifyBackupStrategyRequest.RegularBackupStartTime
documentation:
定期备份开始日期，格式-YYYY-MM-DD 默认当前日期
\:rtype: str
ModifyBackupStrategy请求参数结构体

documentation:
> ```
> param _OldName

> 库的名字，如果oldName不存在则返回失败。
> ```

在用于离线迁移任务时可不填。
: ```
  type OldName

  str

  param _NewName

  库的新名字，在用于离线迁移时，不填则按照OldName命名，OldName和NewName不能同时不填。在用于克隆数据库时，OldName和NewName都必须填写，且不能重复

  type NewName

  str
  ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.RenameRestoreDatabase.OldName
documentation:
库的名字，如果oldName不存在则返回失败。
在用于离线迁移任务时可不填。

> ```
> rtype
>
> str
> ```

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.RenameRestoreDatabase.NewName
documentation:
库的新名字，在用于离线迁移时，不填则按照OldName命名，OldName和NewName不能同时不填。在用于克隆数据库时，OldName和NewName都必须填写，且不能重复
\:rtype: str
用于RestoreInstance，RollbackInstance，CreateMigration、CloneDB、ModifyBackupMigration 等接口；对恢复的库进行重命名，且支持选择要恢复的库。

  0 - \u4E0D\u4F7F\u7528\uFF1B1 - \u9ED8\u8BA4\u4F7F\u7528\u3002\u53D6\u503C\u9ED8\
  \u8BA4\u4E3A0"
param _Cpu: "\u5B9E\u4F8B\u5347\u7EA7\u540E\u7684CPU\u6838\u5FC3\u6570"
param _DBVersion: "\u5347\u7EA7sqlserver\u7684\u7248\u672C\uFF0C\u76EE\u524D\u652F\
  \u6301\uFF1A2008R2\uFF08SQL Server 2008 Enterprise\uFF09\uFF0C2012SP3\uFF08SQL Server\
  \ 2012 Enterprise\uFF09\u7248\u672C\u7B49\u3002\u6BCF\u4E2A\u5730\u57DF\u652F\u6301\

  \u50CF\u5BB9\u707E\u5347\u7EA7\u5230always on\u96C6\u7FA4\u5BB9\u707E\uFF0C\u4EC5\

  \u7528\u7684\u5B9E\u4F8B\uFF0C\u4E0D\u652F\u6301\u964D\u7EA7\u5230\u955C\u50CF\u65B9\
  \u5F0F\u5BB9\u707E\uFF0CCLUSTER-\u5347\u7EA7\u4E3Aalways on\u5BB9\u707E\uFF0C\u4E0D\
  \u586B\u5219\u4E0D\u4FEE\u6539\u9AD8\u53EF\u7528\u67B6\u6784"
param _InstanceId: "\u5B9E\u4F8BID\uFF0C\u5F62\u5982mssql-j8kv137v"

  \u5B58\u5927\u5C0F"

  \u6539\u4E3A\u8DE8\u53EF\u7528\u533A"

  1 - \u7EF4\u62A4\u65F6\u95F4\u7A97\u6267\u884C"

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.InstanceId
documentation:
实例ID，形如mssql-j8kv137v
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.Memory
documentation:
实例升级后内存大小，单位GB，其值不能小于当前实例内存大小
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.Storage
documentation:
实例升级后磁盘大小，单位GB，其值不能小于当前实例磁盘大小
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.AutoVoucher
documentation:
是否自动使用代金券，0 - 不使用；1 - 默认使用。取值默认为0
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.VoucherIds
documentation:
代金券ID，目前单个订单只能使用一张代金券
\:rtype: list of str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.Cpu
documentation:
实例升级后的CPU核心数
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.DBVersion
documentation:
升级sqlserver的版本，目前支持：2008R2（SQL Server 2008 Enterprise），2012SP3（SQL Server 2012 Enterprise）版本等。每个地域支持售卖的版本不同，可通过DescribeProductConfig接口来拉取每个地域可售卖的版本信息，版本不支持降级，不填则不修改版本
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.HAType
documentation:
升级sqlserver的高可用架构,从镜像容灾升级到always on集群容灾，仅支持2017及以上版本且支持always on高可用的实例，不支持降级到镜像方式容灾，CLUSTER-升级为always on容灾，不填则不修改高可用架构
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.MultiZones
documentation:
修改实例是否为跨可用区容灾，SameZones-修改为同可用区 MultiZones-修改为跨可用区
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.UpgradeDBInstanceRequest.WaitSwitch
documentation:
执行变配的方式，默认为 1。支持值包括：0 - 立刻执行，1 - 维护时间窗执行
\:rtype: int
UpgradeDBInstance请求参数结构体

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ZoneInfo.Zone
documentation:
可用区英文ID，形如ap-guangzhou-1，表示广州一区
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ZoneInfo.SpecId
documentation:
该可用区目前可售卖的规格ID，利用SpecId，结合接口DescribeProductConfig返回的数据，可获悉该可用区目前可售卖的规格大小
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.sqlserver.v20180328.models.ZoneInfo.Version
documentation:
当前可用区与规格下，可售卖的数据库版本，形如2008R2（表示SQL Server 2008 R2）。其可选值有2008R2（表示SQL Server 2008 R2），2012SP3（表示SQL Server 2012），2016SP1（表示SQL Server 2016 SP1）
\:rtype: str
可用区信息
